narrative.headline: What 2016 Kia Soul Ev owners report most
narrative.summary: The dominant pattern across owner complaints is sudden loss of power while driving, often with no warning. A secondary cluster describes knocking noises from the engine compartment accompanied by power loss, and a smaller share of owners report hesitation or sluggish response when pressing the accelerator. Powertrain communication issues — where the vehicle behaves as though it has slipped into neutral after the accelerator is released — also appear across reports.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle stopping or cutting out entirely while driving at normal road speeds, with no prior warning signs. · 28 fire · 4 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Engine And Engine Cooling
issues.blurb: Owners report a knocking sound from the engine compartment followed by sudden loss of power while the vehicle is in motion. · 2 fire · 1 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report intermittent hesitation when pressing the accelerator, describing a feeling that the vehicle is not picking up speed as expected. · 4 fire · 1 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle losing its response to the accelerator after releasing and re-pressing the pedal, causing the vehicle to behave as though it has shifted into neutral. · 2 fire · 1 crash
